blocks.text: Wærenskjold Targets Norwegian Glory at Gent-Wevelgem

Sunday's marquee moment arrives from the Belgian cobbles: Søren Wærenskjold — Norway's most explosive sprinter-classics rider — lines up for Gent-Wevelgem, a race built for his raw engine. Two Norwegian golfers are meanwhile hunting leaderboard positions in Houston.
🚴 Gent-Wevelgem 2026 — Wærenskjold leads Norwegian charge in iconic Flanders Classic at 11:00
⛳ Houston Open — Reitan & Ventura tee off with leaderboard heating up, Højgaard lurks at -10 at 05:00
